violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety that is registered with the RIDOH Center for Food Protection. PIC did successfully complete a Food Safety Course and test. Application for Certified Food Safety Manager License to be submitted as soon as possible. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2025

No person certified in food safety was available at the time of inspection. A person certified in food safety is required to be on site at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety that is registered with the RIDOH Center for Food Protection. At least one individual certified in food safety is to be a Licensed Food Safety Manager for the location that is registered with RIDOH CFP. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2025

No person certified in food safety was available at the time of inspection. A person certified in food safety is required to be on site at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety that is registered with the RIDOH Center for Food Protection. At least one individual certified in food safety is to be a Licensed Food Safety Manager for the location that is registered with RIDOH CFP. New Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2025

No person certified in food safety was available at the time of inspection. A person certified in food safety is required to be on site at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2024

No person certified in food safety was available at the time of inspection. A person certified in food safety is required to be on site at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 09/23/2024

Milk in the larger Chest Cooler was observed held at 41 to 45 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Milk was moved to colder refrigeration at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/23/2024

At the time of inspection, whole fruits were observed rinsed/prepped at the pre-flush sprayer to the dish machine area next to wall mounted chemicals. Staff are to rinse/prep food items in the sanitizer bay of the 3-bay sink where the sink is properly air gapped and chemicals are not stored/mounted. (Apples were moved at the time of inspection.) Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/23/2024

The Larger Milk Chest Cooler located in the cafeteria area was observed to be in need of repair/adjustment. The ambient temperature was observed at 40 to 47 degrees Fahrenheit with Milk Temperatures observed at 41 to 45 degrees Fahrenheit. Use of the Large Chest Cooler for Storage of Time/Temperature Control for Safety Foods is to be discontinued until serviced/repaired/replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 09/23/2024

The hand sink in the kitchen and bathroom observed with a water temperature of 69 degrees Fahrenheit. A HANDWASHING SINK shall be equipped to provide water at a temperature of at least 100 degrees Fahrneheit through a mixing valve or combination faucet. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/11/2023

The dumpster outside is located on dirt/grass. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/11/2023

The hand sink in the kitchen and bathroom observed with a water temperature of 65 degrees Fahrenheit. A HANDWASHING SINK shall be equipped to provide water at a temperature of at least 100 degrees Fahrneheit through a mixing valve or combination faucet. New Violation. Correct By: 10/11/2023

The dumpster outside is located on dirt/grass. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/11/2023
